code: import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import Logo from'./Logo';import{INSTAGRAM_URL}from'../constants/brand';import'./Navbar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Navbar(){const _useLocation=useLocation(),pathname=_useLocation.pathname;const links=[{to:'/',label:'Home'},{to:'/videos',label:'Videos'},{to:'/blogs',label:'Blogs'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"navbar",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"navbar-inner",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/",className:"navbar-brand","aria-label":"Very Direct home",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"navbar-brand__frame",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Logo,{size:"nav",variant:"header"})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"navbar-nav","aria-label":"Main navigation",children:links.map(_ref=>{let to=_ref.to,label=_ref.label;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:to,className:"nav-link ".concat(pathname===to?'active':''),children:label},to);})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"navbar-end",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:INSTAGRAM_URL,target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"navbar-cta",children:"Follow on Instagram"})})]})});}
